channel.title: jvm on Paul Hübner
channel.description: Recent content in jvm on Paul Hübner

item.title: GC-Agnostic Load Barriers
item.description: What are GC barriers and how do they relate to ahead-of-time compilation? This blog post explores the intersection of HotSpot’s GCs and compilers through the lense of implementing GC-agnostic load barriers at the assembly level, and gives key insights on performance and overall takeaways.
